vibe: Cinematic, moody, high-contrast, editorial magazine meets game art book. Applying for Riot Games.

headings.usage: Massive headlines, tight tracking (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter), editorial storytelling feel.

body.usage: Clean geometric contrast against the serif headings. Good for readability.

accents.style: uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs to text-sm for overlines, labels, and metadata.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-24 for padding. Create breathing room around art.
layout.grid_system: Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetric, overlapping. Mix wide (col-span-8) and tall (row-span-2) shapes. Never use perfectly equal squares for the gallery.
layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align dense text blocks. Asymmetrical placement of headings to create tension.

components.navigation: Sticky, crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Logo on left, links on right. Delicate 1px bottom border (border-white/10).
components.hero: Max overlay opacity bg-black/40. The image MUST be visible. Massive H1 ('Tlishue') with tight tracking. A clear sub-headline targeting '2D Concept Artist | Riot Games'.
components.projects_gallery: Bento grid/Masonry layout. Direct pure HTML/Tailwind for structure. Hover state: subtle scale (scale-105) and descriptive overlay. Click opens Shadcn Dialog for detail view.
components.skills: The 'Editorial Ribbon'. A very slow marquee using react-fast-marquee. Outline text or contrasting gold text to show skills without boring bullet points.
components.contact: Massive footer typography. 'LET'S TALK' at text-[10vw]. Contrast shift (e.g., gold background with black text, or remain dark with giant gold text).

motion.hover: Smooth transitions on images (transition-transform duration-500 ease-out).
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for gallery items using framer-motion.
motion.scrolling: MUST use 'lenis' for momentum scrolling. It's critical for the premium editorial feel.

hero_background.description: Giant skull in a dark forest with light beams. High impact concept art backdrop.

projects.title: Sunfire Guardian
projects.description: Character Concept Art: Armored warrior outdoors. Explored material rendering for plate mail.

projects.title: Freljordian Shieldmaiden
projects.description: Character Concept Art: Artistic makeup and warpaint study for a northern warrior.

projects.title: Zaun Lower Levels
projects.description: Environment Concept Art: Gritty cyberpunk/chem-tech street view.

projects.title: Piltover Skyline
projects.description: Environment Concept Art: High-rise buildings illuminating the night.

projects.title: Noxian Commander
projects.description: Character Concept Art: Ornate armor and fierce portrait study.

projects.title: Astral Divide
projects.description: Environment Concept Art: Northern lights over jagged peaks.

about_image.description: Artistic self-representation portrait for the bio section.

texture.description: Dark gold vertical lines texture. Can be used for subtle section dividers or marquee backgrounds with opacity-10.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install libraries: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react react-fast-marquee framer-motion @studio-freight/lenis clsx tailwind-merge
Import fonts: Add Playfair Display and Outfit from Google Fonts in index.html.
Structure: Pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, avoiding rigid Shadcn 'Card' components to maintain an art-forward, borderless editorial look.
Grid: Use CSS Grid with varying col-spans (e.g., col-span-4 vs col-span-8) to create an asymmetric, masonry-like gallery for the 'Projects' section.
Shadcn: Use Shadcn UI ONLY for the Dialog component when clicking on a project for a detailed view.
Testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements, navigation links, and project cards.
Navigation: Keep nav links visible on desktop (no hamburger menu). Hamburger menu is only for mobile.
Images: Respect max-h-[80vh] for images on mobile to prevent blocking content.
Accessibility: Ensure hover/focus states have adequate contrast, especially text over images.
Aesthetics: Keep gradient use to a minimum. Let the art pieces be the primary source of color against the deep black background.
